title: Mexico Multi-Payer Insurance Verification Gap
problem: Mexico's fragmented healthcare system has multiple insurance schemes (IMSS, ISSSTE, private insurers, INSABI replacement). Providers must verify coverage across different systems with no unified platform. Prior authorization is manual, slow, and error-prone. Patients often don't know their coverage status, leading to denied claims and delayed care.
solution: Real-time eligibility verification platform connecting all Mexican insurance schemes. Single API for providers to check coverage, benefits, and prior authorization requirements. Automated prior auth for common procedures. Patient-facing app to view coverage status.
technology: API integration with IMSS/ISSSTE/private insurers, real-time eligibility checks, prior authorization automation, mobile app
target_customer: Private hospitals, clinics, individual physicians, urgent care centers
traction_signals: High claim denial rates creating demand
regulatory_notes: Mexico data protection laws, integration with government health databases
varden_fit: CRITICAL FIT - Availity (US) model for Mexico. This is the most boring, critical infrastructure play. Dual-sided network (payers + providers) creates defensibility. Zero local competition.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Zero players in Mexico doing this. Availity handles trillions in US claims. Mexico is natural expansion market. Boring infrastructure with massive moat once established.
